title: New #1 open-source AI model is here!
summary: AI Search reviews GLM 5.2, described as a new best-in-class open-source AI model. The video demonstrates capabilities including digital earth visualization, 3D model generation, animation with voiceover, ray tracing, music composition, and math animation. GLM integrates with Claude's code environment.
writeup: AI Search reviews GLM 5.2, presented as a new best-in-class open-source AI model, and runs it through a series of practical demonstrations. The tests span digital earth visualization, 3D model generation, animation paired with voiceover, ray tracing, music composition, and math animation, with the model also shown integrating into Claude's code environment. The breadth of tasks points to multimodal capability and tool integration across visual, audio, and code-oriented outputs.
